lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਆਸਾ ਮਨਸਾ ਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kit bidh aasaa manasaa khaaee |
lines.english: How have you subdued your hopes and desires?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kit bidh jot nirantar paaee |
lines.english: How have you found the Light deep within your nucleus?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਦੰਤਾ ਕਿਉ ਖਾਈਐ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bin dantaa kiau khaaeeai saar |
lines.english: Without teeth, how can you eat iron?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਚਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: naanak saachaa karahu beechaar |19|
lines.english: Give us your true opinion, Nanak." ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਹਤਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: anahat raate ihu man laaeaa |
lines.english: My mind is attached and attuned to the unstruck sound current.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਜਨਮੇ ਗਵਨੁ ਮਿਟਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kai janame gavan mittaaeaa |
lines.english: Born into the House of the True Guru, my wandering in reincarnation ended.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jot nirantar paaee |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, I found the Light deep within the nucleus of my self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਸਾ ਆਸਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: manasaa aasaa sabad jalaaee |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Shabad, my hopes and desires have been burnt away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਮੇਟੇ ਖਾਈਐ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun mette khaaeeai saar |
lines.english: Eradicating the three qualities, one eats iron.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਾਰੇ ਤਾਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: naanak taare taaranahaar |20|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Emancipator emancipates. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਕਉ ਕਵਨੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ਕਥੀਅਲੇ ਸੁੰਨ ਕਹਾ ਘਰ ਵਾਸੋ ॥
lines.translit: aad kau kavan beechaar katheeale sun kahaa ghar vaaso |
lines.english: "What can you tell us about the beginning? In what home did the absolute dwell then?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲ ਕਾ ਠੀਗਾ ਕਿਉ ਜਲਾਈਅਲੇ ਕਿਉ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: kaal kaa ttheegaa kiau jalaaeeale kiau nirbhau ghar jaaeeai |
lines.english: How can one avoid the attack of death? How can one enter the home of fearlessness?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਕੀ ਮੁਦ੍ਰਾ ਕਵਨ ਕਥੀਅਲੇ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਕਵਨ ਨਿਵਾਸੋ ॥
lines.translit: giaan kee mudraa kavan katheeale ghatt ghatt kavan nivaaso |
lines.english: What are the ear-rings of spiritual wisdom? Who dwells in each and every heart?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਬਿਖੁ ਮਾਰੈ ਤਾ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਵਾਸੋ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad haumai bikh maarai taa nij ghar hovai vaaso |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, egotism and corruption are conquered, and then one comes to dwell in the home of the self within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਸੰਤੋਖ ਕਾ ਆਸਣੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਕਿਉ ਛੇਦੇ ਬੈਰਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj santokh kaa aasan jaanai kiau chhede bairaaeeai |
lines.english: How can one know the posture of intuition and contentment, and overcome one's adversaries?"

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਰਚਿ ਰਚਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਦਾਸੋ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: jin rach rachiaa tis sabad pachhaanai naanak taa kaa daaso |21|
lines.english: One who realizes the Shabad of the One who created the creation - Nanak is his slave. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਾ ਤੇ ਆਵੈ ਕਹਾ ਇਹੁ ਜਾਵੈ ਕਹਾ ਇਹੁ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kahaa te aavai kahaa ihu jaavai kahaa ihu rahai samaaee |
lines.english: "Where did we come from? Where are we going? Where will we be absorbed?

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਸੁ ਸਬਦ ਕਉ ਜੋ ਅਰਥਾਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਤਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: es sabad kau jo arathaavai tis gur til na tamaaee |
lines.english: One who reveals the meaning of this Shabad is the Guru, who has no greed at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸੁਰਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਬੀਚਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: aape surataa aape karataa kahu naanak beechaaro |
lines.english: He Himself is consciousness, He Himself is the Creator; share with us, Nanak, your wisdom."

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਤਤੈ ਅਵਿਗਤੈ ਪਾਵੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਲਗੈ ਪਿਆਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: kiau tatai avigatai paavai guramukh lagai piaaro |
lines.english: How can one find the essence of the unmanifest reality? How does one become Gurmukh, and enshrine love for the Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਆਵੈ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਜਾਵੈ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: hukame aavai hukame jaavai hukame rahai samaaee |
lines.english: By His Command we come, and by His Command we go; by His Command, we merge in absorption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਸਾਚੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਸਬਦੇ ਪਾਈ ॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: poore gur te saach kamaavai gat mit sabade paaee |22|
lines.english: Through the Perfect Guru, live the Truth; through the Word of the Shabad, the state of dignity is attained. ||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਕਉ ਬਿਸਮਾਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ਕਥੀਅਲੇ ਸੁੰਨ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਵਾਸੁ ਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: aad kau bisamaad beechaar katheeale sun nirantar vaas leea |
lines.english: We can only express a sense of wonder about the beginning. The absolute abided endlessly deep within Himself then.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਲਪਤ ਮੁਦ੍ਰਾ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੀਅਲੇ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਰਬ ਜੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: akalapat mudraa gur giaan beechaareeale ghatt ghatt saachaa sarab jeea |
lines.english: Consider freedom from desire to be the ear-rings of the Guru's spiritual wisdom. The True Lord, the Soul of all, dwells within each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਅਵਿਗਤਿ ਸਮਾਈਐ ਤਤੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਲਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur bachanee avigat samaaeeai tat niranjan sehaj lahai |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Word, one merges in the absolute, and intuitively receives the immaculate essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਬਿਸਮਾਦੁ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਜੀਅ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਸਚੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: hukam bisamaad hukam pachhaanai jeea jugat sach jaanai soee |
lines.english: Wonderful and amazing is His Command; He alone realizes His Command and knows the true way of life of His creatures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦੂਜੀ ਕਾਰ ਨ ਕਰਣੀ ਸੇਵੈ ਸਿਖੁ ਸੁ ਖੋਜਿ ਲਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: naanak doojee kaar na karanee sevai sikh su khoj lahai |
lines.english: O Nanak, that Sikh who seeks and finds the Way does not serve any other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਮੇਟਿ ਨਿਰਾਲਮੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਾਚੁ ਜੋਗੀ ਕਹੀਐ ਸੋਈ ॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: aap mett niraalam hovai antar saach jogee kaheeai soee |23|
lines.english: One who eradicates his self-conceit becomes free of desire; he alone is a Yogi, who enshrines the True Lord deep within. ||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਿਗਤੋ ਨਿਰਮਾਇਲੁ ਉਪਜੇ ਨਿਰਗੁਣ ਤੇ ਸਰਗੁਣੁ ਥੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: avigato niramaaeil upaje niragun te saragun theea |
lines.english: From His state of absolute existence, He assumed the immaculate form; from formless, He assumed the supreme form.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਰਚੈ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਇ ਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur parachai param pad paaeeai saachai sabad samaae leea |
lines.english: By pleasing the True Guru, the supreme status is obtained, and one is absorbed in the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜੋਗੀ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕਮਲੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ਥੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: so jogee gurasabad pachhaanai antar kamal pragaas theea |
lines.english: He alone is a Yogi, who realizes the Word of the Guru's Shabad; the lotus of the heart blossoms forth within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੇ ਕਉ ਸਚੁ ਏਕਾ ਜਾਣੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਦੂਰਿ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: eke kau sach ekaa jaanai haumai doojaa door keea |
lines.english: He knows the True Lord as the One and only; he sends his egotism and duality far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤੁ ਮਰੈ ਤਾ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਸੂਝੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਸਰਬ ਦਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jeevat marai taa sabh kichh soojhai antar jaanai sarab deaa |
lines.english: If one remains dead while yet alive, then he understands everything; he knows the Lord deep within himself, who is kind and compassionate to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਾਈ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਸਰਬ ਜੀਆ ॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: naanak taa kau milai vaddaaee aap pachhaanai sarab jeea |24|
lines.english: O Nanak, he is blessed with glorious greatness; he realizes himself in all beings. ||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠੇ ਆਵਹਿ ਠਵਰ ਨ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਆਵਾ ਗਉਣੁ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jhootthe aaveh tthavar na paaveh doojai aavaa gaun bheaa |
lines.english: The false come, and find no place of rest; in duality, they come and go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੌ ਉਪਜੈ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ਸਾਚੇ ਸੂਚੇ ਏਕ ਮਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: saachau upajai saach samaavai saache sooche ek meaa |
lines.english: We emerge from Truth, and merge into Truth again. The pure being merges into the One True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਾ ਗਉਣੁ ਮਿਟੈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਆਪੇ ਪਰਖੈ ਬਖਸਿ ਲਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aavaa gaun mittai gurasabadee aape parakhai bakhas leaa |
lines.english: This coming and going in reincarnation is ended through the Word of the Guru's Shabad; the Lord Himself analyzes and grants His forgiveness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਾ ਬੇਦਨ ਦੂਜੈ ਬਿਆਪੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਸਾਇਣੁ ਵੀਸਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ekaa bedan doojai biaapee naam rasaaein veesariaa |
lines.english: One who suffers from the disease of duality, forgets the Naam, the source of nectar.
